title: Column permission to enable updating item column but disabling deletion of column value
excerpt:
Column permission options to: 

Enable updates only
Disable the X button in the column so any value is not deleted, but updated only

posts.author: julie.cortez (Julie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Column permission options to:

  1. Enable updates only
  2. Disable the X button in the column so any value is not deleted, but updated only

posts.author: julie.cortez (Julie)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is especially helpful for these 2 automations where trigger is dependent on any changed value only.
